source: Mock — architected for future CISA / NESA API integration

items.label: Published CVEs (2026 YTD)
items.briefing: 487 new CVEs published year-to-date, 12% above the same period in 2025. Increased attack surface requires heightened awareness training.

items.label: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities
items.briefing: The CISA KEV catalog has grown to 1,197 entries. 43 additions in 2026 indicate active exploitation campaigns relevant to educational institutions.

items.label: Education Sector Risk Level
items.briefing: Education remains a high-risk sector globally. Ransomware groups continue to target school networks due to limited IT budgets and high data value.

items.label: Phishing Campaigns Targeting Youth
items.briefing: Youth-targeted phishing campaigns have risen 18% quarter-over-quarter, with social media credential harvesting and gaming scams as primary vectors.
